Entries.594843/f Shane 1750/n MTV_ShaneQ3/t 1000: playful/70 108/farmer 97 92 0 Shane 79 98 0/skippable/addMailReceived MTV_ShaneQ3T/Speak Shane "Oh. Hey there @#$b#I know I sent you that message but I wasn't sure whether you'd come. Or if I wanted you to.#$b#Don't get me wrong - I love it when you're around me, but sometimes it feels like I have to....I dunno...put on more of a face when people I love are near."/Pause 500/Emote farmer 28/quickQuestion Have you ever struggled with deep sadness? Or depression?#Sometimes, but not often.#I have, in the past. It's why I left Joja Corp.#It's still part of my life(break)Speak Shane "It makes me happier to know that you don't. My biggest fear is that everyone feels this way but it's just me that can't cope."(break)Speak Shane "I guess Joja really broke both of us."(break)Speak Shane "I don't know if what I have is depression, or just from giving up drinking. Hell, it might even be from dreaming about the past again."/message "*lean on shoulder.*"/pause 290/Speak Shane "I’m sorry. I don't want to burden you with this. Marnie carries on like clockwork every day.#$b#She gives me this smile when she sees me, but it's the same no matter how I’m doing or what I’ve done that day.#$b#I feel like I could screw up in the worst way, let out all the cows and chickens, and she'd still give me that smile, as if just by smiling at me she can chase away the darkness."/pause 1500/speak Shane "Look, if you want to go that's fine. There's nothing you can do to make me feel better today, and I think I just want to sit here for a while."/Message "*You cuddle into them*"/Pause 1500/Message "You sit there for a while, just leaning against Shane. You can tell that he's tense, probably anxious, and so you sit there, listen, and make sure he can feel you being present."/pause 850/Message "You can tell that his breathing is starting to settle and slow, and you take that as a good sign.#After a while he leans back on the grass and stares at the sky. You can see that the day is starting to come to a close."/Speak Shane "It's getting late, @. We should probably head back before you get too cold. Thank you for being here with me.#$b#I was worried that if I asked you to come then it was because I needed help, and I didn't want to admit that to myself.#$b#If I admitted to myself I wasn't strong enough then I felt I would crumble."/Message "You lean back and cuddle Shane, resting your head on his chest. You can definitely feel the chill coming on."/quickQuestion What do you want to say to Shane?#Do you want to do something to distract you and warm up?#We should head inside soon but not yet. I'm up for talking more if you are.(break)SwitchEvent 594843Cheer(break)SwitchEvent 594843Talk""/End

Entries.594843Talk: pause 1500/speak Shane "Thank you, @. You make the good days better, and you make bad days like this feel manageable."/message "You can hear Shane settle and relax, and can only imagine what is going through his mind right now.#After a while he turns to face you."/speak Shane "My fear is that the more I try to hold it together the more fragile I get, and all I really want is to crumble so I don't have to pretend to be someone else."/pause 450/speak Shane "I'm telling you this but I don't want an answer.#$b#I think I'm broken and I don't believe there is a way to 'fix' me.#$b#Even worse, if it turns out there was a way to fix this all along, or if everyone else is dealing with the same challenges and succeeding, then it would break me."/pause 450/question null "What do you want to say to Shane?#Is there anything other than your fears that drives you on?#Do you have anything you hope to do yet?"/speak Shane "I think there are a few things I want to do, like showing Jas how to raise the chickens, maybe show my blue chickens to more people outside the Valley.#$b#I think in terms of what I want to get done before...the end. Like I need to wrap things up before I can move on."/question null "#The things in life that I love don't have an objective you can 'complete'. Like caring for my animals, or spending time with you. They just keep giving to me, a little at a time."/pause 900/message "Shane lies there for a while, thinking about what you've said. There are times you can see him about to speak but then he hesitates or changes his mind."/pause 750/speak Shane "If I'm being honest with you, my internal voice keeps saying that you're wrong. I know that the voice hasn't been giving me options that bring me happiness so I'm going to trust you."/question null "#It's ok to not know what to do.#I don't know what to do either."/speak Shane "Thanks @. I guess we stumble along in life until we find something we like. Maybe we can stumble along together."/end
